{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032114291575F7F7FFC36F5D0A67E1"}"},"total":11911},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7259709111837901628","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"说实在的，我觉得这本书值得更高分。女主就是妥妥打脸怼人小能手，三观正的不行，极度舒适。文笔逻辑都很严密，没有一点流水文的感觉。很多案件都有体现现在社会的一些问题，蛮现实。人物描写也丰满，怎么都值得评个9.6"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1690282810,"group_id":"7189536565176044581","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"姐姐的腿不是腿，是塞纳河畔的春水🍓","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N89de89ieMZ7cFIQjXtdWWqBr+eH6DrXQvyy/HJ5WtSh","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/95508a7e68f54528a449a2f4f5dbb3a1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776621384&x-signature=pevwCjYNnAQlb3WmG%2BqoBRc47jI%3D","user_id":"2942706663294391","user_name":"ggk"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2942706663294391","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7189536565176044581","book_info":{"abstract":"凌无忧此人，路过的蚂蚁瞧见了，都要和同伴说一句：“别惹那个疯子！”
这家伙说两句就变炮仗，成年人的体面她是一点不要。
在公安大学习期间，不少同学被她教训了好几回，谁让人力气不大，阴招却层出不穷呢？
后来疯子成为了一名光荣的警察，嘴上说着“这钱少事多的破工作谁爱干谁干”，但破案追凶永远冲第一。
刑警大队的队长看着满桌子的投诉单，日日天人交战，爱恨纠缠：问，徒儿太会惹事了，想抄她鱿鱼但是舍不得怎么破？
人美钱多的大少爷时垣每日对她贴心问候：“再不找男朋友你就老了。”
凌无忧：“关你屁事？”
时垣：“。”
---
非传统良善女主X绿茶男主

后来疯子成为了一名光荣的警察，嘴上说着“这钱少事多的破工作谁爱干谁干”，但破案追凶永远冲第一。
